channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lakers snap Nuggets' 9-game winning streak behind Luka Doncic's best game yet for LA
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 32 points in his best game by far with the Lakers, leading Los Angeles to a 123-100 runaway win at Denver on Saturday night that snapped the Nuggets' nine-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Messi assists on Segovia's late goal, Inter Miami ties New York City FC 2-2 in MLS season opener
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Telasco Segovia scored the tying goal on an assist by Lionel Messi in the 10th minute of stoppage time, and Inter Miami played New York City FC to a 2-2 draw in their MLS opener Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Aldrich Potgieter hangs on to 1-shot lead in Mexico Open
item.description: VALLARTA, Mexico (AP) — Aldrich Potgieter had the lead going into the final round of the Mexico Open, minus the cushion he enjoyed after a sloppy finish Saturday that made him settle for a 4-under 67 and a one-shot advantage over Brian Campbell at Vidanta Vallarta.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Alabama high school football coach faces 11 charges for alleged inappropriate relationship with student
item.description: Robert Carter, the football coach at Clarke County High School in Alabama, was arrested and charged with 11 counts after an alleged inappropriate relationship with a student.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Johni Broome's season-high 31 points and 14 rebounds lead No. 1 Auburn past Georgia 82-70
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Johni Broome scored a season-high 31 points and added 14 rebounds as No. 1 Auburn defeated Georgia 82-70 on Saturday. For the second straight game, Auburn (25-2, 13-1 SEC) found itself in a tight contest against an unranked opponent before pulling away in the final minutes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Social media user alleges ex-Ravens star had affair with his wife, who apparently is on team's marching band
item.description: Former Baltimore Ravens receiver Steve Smith Sr. was accused of having an affair with a member of the team's marching band, according to a social media user claiming to be her husband.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Briscoe tries to move past devastating penalties and Blaney to start on pole in NASCAR Atlanta race
item.description: A massive fine left Chase Briscoe facing a huge points deficit heading into Sunday's NASCAR Cup Series race at Atlanta Motor Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Fox 5

item.title: Shelstad sends game to OT with a deep 3 as Oregon pulls out a 77-73 win vs. No. 11 Wisconsin
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Nate Bittle had 23 points and Jackson Shelstad made a desperation 3 to force overtime as Oregon beat No. 11 Wisconsin 77-73 on Saturday. Bittle, a 7-foot center, scored six points in overtime to help snap Wisconsin’s five-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: TAMIRA MADSEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: State education chief says it's 'inaccurate' to say there are only two genders, in defense of trans athletes
item.description: Washington state Superintendent of Public Instruction Chris Reykdal spoke out in defense of transgender athletes in girls sports in an address Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New Hampshire follows Trump's transgender sports executive order despite lawsuit from two trans athletes
item.description: Despite a lawsuit by two transgender athletes, New Hampshire has decided to follow President Donald Trump's executive order to bar them from competing against girls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Charles Barkley 'annoyed' with Victor Wembanyama being given 'face of the league' title
item.description: NBA great Charles Barkley doesn't believe the title "face of the league" is one that can just be given out.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees owner Hal Steinbrenner may support a salary cap proposal tied to payroll minimum
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — New York Yankees owner Hal Steinbrenner may support a salary cap proposal as long as it contains a provision mandating minimum payrolls.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Armstrong excited about last two months of season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With 56 games down and 26 to go, the Utah Hockey Club is right in the mix for a playoff spot in its first season in Salt Lake City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former NFL player Chris Kluwe arrested while protesting MAGA sign
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe, an 8-year NFL veteran who played his entire career with the Minnesota Vikings, took to the podium to voice his opposition to the plaque design.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Researchers confirm Hall of Famer Bobby Hull had CTE when he died 2 years ago
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Bobby Hull, the Hall of Fame forward and two-time NHL MVP who helped the Chicago Blackhawks win the Stanley Cup in 1961, had chronic traumatic encephalopathy when he died two years ago, his widow said in a statement released on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU makes a statement, crushing Kansas, 91-57
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In one of the biggest blowouts in the history of Kansas basketball, BYU made a big-time statement with a dominating 91-57 win over the Jayhawks Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Northwestern golfers invited to Augusta National Women's Amateur
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. - Northwestern is going to be well-represented at the 6th Annual Augusta National Women's Amateur Championship. Lauryn Nguyen and Elise Lee are set to the make the trip to Georgia along with NU commit Arianna Lau. "It's such a special place," noted Nguyen.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Eagles player declines actor’s offer to pay Super Bowl fine
item.description: Actor and Eagles fan Rob McElhenny, best known for co-creating and starring in FXX’s “It’s Always Sunny in Philadelphia,” had recently offered to foot the bill for a fine incurred by Eagles player Jalyx Hunt during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: Right-hander Nick Pivetta, Padres finalize $55M four-year contract
item.description: Right-hander Nick Pivetta and the San Diego Padres officially announced a finalized $55 million, four-year contract on Monday, a backloaded deal that allows him to opt out after the 2026 and '27 seasons.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ludvig Aberg rallies down the stretch at Torrey Pines to win the Genesis Invitational
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Ludvig Aberg never felt worse leaving a golf course than three weeks ago at Torrey Pines when he shared the 36-hole lead only to get violently ill from a stomach ailment and stagger to the finish with a 79.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump takes laps on Daytona 500 speedway in The Beast
item.description: “This is your favorite president,” Trump said. “I’m a big fan. I’m a really big fan of you people. How you do this, I don’t know. But I just want you to be safe.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: 7 more massage therapists accuse Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct: Report
item.description: Seven more massage therapists have accused Baltimore Ravens kicker Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct, the Baltimore Banner reported Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Michigan State coach Tom Izzo passes Bob Knight for most Big Ten conference wins
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (AP) — Michigan State’s Tom Izzo followed one of the most disappointing losses of his coaching career with a record-setting victory. For Illinois, it was a game in which nothing went right after halftime — or during it, thanks to an unfortunate jersey-raising snafu. The No.
item.dc:creator: STEVE STEIN, Associated Press, WGN 9
